overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine, depicting a narrow dirt path winding through dense trees and undergrowth with very limited visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark forest trail illuminated by flashlight

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the narrow dirt path, sweeping the flashlight beam across the trail ahead to navigate the darkness

entered.detail: narrow winding trail composed of brown dirt with scattered small stones and patches of grass
tall dark tree trunks forming a dense wall on the left side of the path
cluster of trees and thick vegetation on the right side barely visible in the flashlight beam
tall grass and low bushes lining the left edge of the trail
dense shrubs and ferns on the right side of the path illuminated by the light
dark overhead tree canopy blocking all sky visibility, creating a tunnel-like effect

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a narrow dirt trail through a pitch-black forest at night. The path is illuminated only by a flashlight beam that reveals tall grass, dense undergrowth, and tree trunks pressing in from both sides. The environment remains consistently dark and enclosed throughout the segment, with no other visible agents or significant events occurring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a claustrophobic, pitch-black forest where the only visibility is provided by a narrow flashlight beam. It begins by advancing steadily along a narrow dirt trail, with the light cutting through the darkness to reveal tall grass and dense undergrowth. As the camera pushes deeper into the woods, the beam illuminates weathered tree trunks that press in closely from both sides. The scene remains consistently enclosed and dark, maintaining a sense of isolation as the path winds further into the oppressive nocturnal environment.
